Two recent examples (a deep root-cause fix and a +1,742 line feature build), the boundary of what they can and can't take on (anything on top of an existing stack vs. standing up new infrastructure), why it holds (the four mechanisms from Parts 1-4), and how the pattern carries over to consumer-facing services.
